subject: feat(icons): rebuild icon pipeline with clean SVG and glow-props pattern
body:
SVG source (assets/icon-source.svg):
- Redesigned at 1024x1024 viewBox (was 512)
- Solid colors only — removed all gradients, opacity, glow, fade
- Added shape-rendering="geometricPrecision" for crisp rasterization
- Background fills entire canvas for maskable icon compatibility
- Content within inner 80% safe zone

Generator script (scripts/generate-icons.mjs):
- Moved to glow-props pattern: assets/icon-source.svg → assets/images/
- Added 400 DPI density for high-quality downscaling
- Generates 6 sizes: 1024 (icon, adaptive, splash), 512, 192, 48
- Was: 4 sizes at default DPI in dashboard/icons/

PWA manifest (vite.config.js):
- Updated icon paths from icons/ to assets/images/
- Separate purpose values: any (192, 512), maskable (1024)
- Removed SVG icon entry (PNGs are the standard)

Tags: icons, pwa, infrastructure
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-project-alignment
Semver: patch

title: rebuild icon pipeline with clean SVG and glow-props pattern
